label: The Trophy Case
subtitle: Championships, recognition and public service
intro: Awards and plaques connect the room to specific seasons, events, titles and moments when BMX reached beyond the track.

label: The Rider’s Wardrobe
subtitle: Jerseys, helmets and race identity
intro: Wearable objects preserve team identity, rider numbers, personal habits and the visual language of Harry Leary’s later BMX life.

label: The Workshop Bench
subtitle: Frames, bars and tools
intro: The workshop objects show history as something built, adjusted, damaged, carried and kept in motion rather than merely displayed.

label: The Memory Wall
subtitle: Correspondence, photographs and relationships
intro: Letters, signed photographs and relationship records preserve the human network surrounding the artifacts.
